name: 单位圆
subject: math
curriculum_points: HSF-TF.A.2 Explain how the unit circle in the coordinate plane enables the extension of trigonometric functions to all real numbers, interpreted as radian measures of angles traversed counterclockwise around the unit circle.

HSF-TF.A.3 Use special triangles to determine geometrically the values of sine, cosine, tangent for π/3, π/4 and π/6, and use the unit circle to express the values of sine, cosine, and tangent for π–x, π+x, and 2π–x in terms of their values for x, where x is any real number.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「单位圆」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HSF-TF.A.2 Explain how the unit circle in the coordinate plane enables the extension of trigonometric functions to all r…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HSF-TF.A.3 Use special triangles to determine geometrically the values of sine, … 对理解「单位圆」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
